prompt: A [architectural detail type] of a [building style] — [lens] so close that the building's identity is not immediately apparent, only the [architectural detail type]'s [material quality] filling the frame: [surface characteristic], [color detail], [depth or relief] visible in side-lighting, [scale indicator] the only reference to the detail's actual size, [light source] the single defining element of the composition, architectural detail photography still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
